title: Rasta Ray's Groovy Grenada Day
summary: Rasta Ray loves music! He shares his love of steelpan music and Grenadian dance with all the [pickney] on the island, spreading joy and rhythm everywhere he goes. He learns that sharing his talents makes everyone happy.

pages.text: Rasta Ray lives in Grenada. He loves to play his steelpan. Boom! Boom! Ting!
pages.imagePrompt: Illustration of Rasta Ray, a small boy with dreadlocks, standing in front of a brightly colored house in Grenada. He is smiling and holding a miniature steelpan. Palm trees and tropical flowers surround the house. The sky is bright blue.

pages.text: Today, Rasta Ray wants to play for all the [pickney] [child]! He packs his little steelpan and a mango to [nyam] [eat].
pages.imagePrompt: Rasta Ray walking down a sunny road in Grenada, carrying a small steelpan in one hand and a bright yellow mango in the other. Other children are playing nearby, smiling at him. The houses are painted in vibrant Caribbean colors.

pages.text: He goes to the beach. The waves say, “Shhh! Shhh!” He plays a happy song. Ting! Boom! Ting!
pages.imagePrompt: Rasta Ray playing his steelpan on a sandy beach in Grenada. The turquoise water is calm and clear. Children are gathered around him, clapping and dancing to the music. Colorful fishing boats are in the distance.

pages.text: The [pickney] love his music! They dance and laugh. Rasta Ray smiles. He loves to share his music.
pages.imagePrompt: Close-up shot of the children dancing and laughing around Rasta Ray on the beach. They are holding hands and moving to the rhythm of the steelpan music. A young girl offers him a piece of sugar cake. The scene is filled with joy and energy.

pages.text: Sharing his music makes everyone happy! Rasta Ray feels good. Music and friends make the best day!
pages.imagePrompt: Rasta Ray surrounded by children on the beach, all smiling and laughing. The sun is setting, casting a warm golden glow over the scene. The Grenadian flag is waving gently in the background. They are eating sugar cake and enjoying the last light of the day.
